name: French Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, salt, and baking powder.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. Beat the eggs in a separate bowl, then add water, milk, and vanilla.
4. Pour the liquid ingredients into the well.
5. Combine with a spatula until just mixed; do not overmix.
6. Cook each side for about 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
